privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Value Stream Mapping task for manufacturing. The task uses draw.io desktop (version 26.0.9) to create Lean manufacturing diagrams for an ACME Stamping Plant producing Steering Brackets for State Street Assembly (customer) supplied by Michigan Steel Co. (supplier). Key verified values: Total Processing Time = 188 seconds (sum of cycle times from Stamping 1s, Welding I 39s, Welding II 46s, Assembly I 62s, Assembly II 40s). Customer demand is 18,400 pieces/month (920 pieces/day for a 20-day working month). Total Lead Time = 23.5 days. All required processes (Stamping, Welding I, Welding II, Assembly I, Assembly II, Shipping), data values, and future state improvement terms (Weld Cell, Assembly Cell, Supermarket, FIFO, Kaizen) are documented in the synthetic data sheet created in setup_task.sh. The task requires completing a current-state VSM and designing a future-state VSM, then exporting to PDF.
